findings.description: Loss of two-column layout in the header block
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the names and titles (Easley, Odom) and the contact information (Beal, phone number) are arranged in two distinct columns. In the HTML, they are collapsed into a single, vertically stacked left-aligned block.
The state seal image is horizontally centered at the top of the PDF page, but it is rendered top-left aligned in the HTML.

findings.description: Loss of centering and right-indentation for multiple text blocks
findings.evidence: The date ('January 30, 2002'), subject block ('Re: 2002 DOR...'), sign-off ('Sincerely,'), and signature block ('Wilbert R. Morris...') are either centered or right-indented in the PDF. In the HTML, all of these elements are left-aligned.
